programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: High School Debut
programme.desc: Yoh agrees to teach Haruna how to get a boyfriend but on the condition she doesn't fall in love with him.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Pumpkin Girl
programme.desc: When Nana is held hostage in her apartment by three masked robbers, she decides to join them.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: The World of Us
programme.desc: A bullied girl becomes friends with a new kid during a break, but when classes start up again, their new friendship is nearly ruined when the bullying continues.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.sub-title: Jennifer Doudna on CRISPR Gene Editing

programme.desc: El lado más fascinante de la vida es capturado por un grupo de comediantes.

programme.desc: Con un refinado humor, el talentoso y carismático presentador Franco Escamilla charla con diferentes personalidades acerca de temas de la actualidad, además de juegos y presentaciones musicales.

programme.desc: Un talk show cómico, diferente y entretenido con Platanito, quien entrevistará a importantes personajes de la farándula, concursos y rutinas de comedia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una típica familia mexicana disfuncional conformada por Gaspar, el padre de la familia, su hijo Jonathan, el abuelo, y un amigo cercano a la familia al que apodan "El Noruego", harán de las suyas en esta comedia animada.

programme.title: Esto es guerra
programme.desc: Un concurso juvenil que divide a los concursantes en dos equipos mixtos, cada equipo con un capitán y un reto por cumplir que es ordenado por el tribunal.

programme.desc: Grandes comediantes presentan lo mejor del entretenimiento, junto a grandes nombres de la música, en un show dinámico y loco.

programme.title: A Que No Puedes VIP
programme.desc: Un programa de entretenimiento donde los actores, cantantes o bandas están invitados a formar dos equipos y realizar retos, el equipo ganador gana dinero para una organización o caridad.

programme.title: Tumbaburros
programme.desc: Concurso que ofrece la oportunidad de ganar dinero en cuestión de minutos.

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: Don Cheto al aire
programme.desc: Un espacio en el que don Cheto narra las mejores anécdotas, ingenia increíbles bromas y aborda las noticias más relevantes para sus oyentes, todo esto de la mano de su estilo único y divertido.

A Los Angeles high-school teacher (Samuel L. Jackson) confronts violent students with a grudge against him and society.

programme.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
programme.desc: Framed for a homicide by his fellow officers, a detective (Dean Ambrose) tries to expose the conspiracy to clear his good name.

programme.title: Things Never Said
programme.desc: Kalindra tries desperately to find an outlet for her struggling voice and escape from her abusive husband.

programme.title: Who Can I Run To?
programme.desc: A gospel singer (Tasha Page Lockhart) renews her faith after reuniting with her former group members.

programme.title: Mr. Church
programme.desc: When a young girl and her dying mother are joined by a black male cook who comes to live with them, little do they know that their lives are about to change forever.

programme.title: Dreams
programme.desc: Two teens (Ahlem Benjeannette, Victoria Rzepa) bond over shared dreams while working in a refugee center.

programme.title: The Waterboyz
programme.desc: Two young men cross paths on the dangerous streets of Atlanta. One tries to make a legitimate living, while the other tries to create mayhem and rule the streets.

programme.title: Never Back Down
programme.desc: A rebellious teenager (Sean Faris) learns to fight from a veteran (Djimon Hounsou) of mixed martial arts after joining an underground fight club.

programme.title: Cut Throat City
programme.desc: When Hurricane Katrina devastates New Orleans, four desperate friends band together to pull off a daring heist in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Freelancers
programme.desc: The son (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) of a fallen police officer joins the NYPD, where he falls in with his father's former partner and a band of rogue cops.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: After the senseless murder of her son (Aml Ameen), a grief-stricken mother (Viola Davis) joins forces with another woman (Jennifer Lopez) for vigilante justice.

programme.title: Never 2 Big
programme.desc: A computer whiz (Shemar Moore) suspected of murder seeks an aspiring actress's (Nia Long) help to elude killers and the law.

programme.title: Blowback
programme.desc: A policeman (Mario Van Peebles) learns that the CIA saved a deranged killer from execution to use as a government assassin.

programme.title: Gang in Blue
programme.desc: Knowing that his comrades are members of a white-supremacist group makes a Black policeman a target.

programme.title: The Reluctant Agent
programme.desc: A waitress is thrust into a deadly game of intrigue when she agrees to impersonate her twin sister, a federal agent.

programme.title: Who's Your Caddy?
programme.desc: When members of a stuffy country club oppose his bid to join, a rap mogul (Antwan "Big Boi" Patton) buys the land adjacent to the golf course's 17th hole.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Escaped convicts (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) fight while they evade authorities seeking a computer disk on Cuban mobsters.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: Personal disputes and problems with drugs, alcohol and illness accompany the musical quintet's rise to fame.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: Personal disputes and problems with drugs, alcohol and illness accompany the musical quintet's rise to fame.

programme.title: Brooklyn's Finest
programme.desc: In the course of one chaotic week, the lives of three conflicted New York City police officers are dramatically transformed by their involvement in a massive drug operation.

programme.title: Rosemary's Baby
programme.desc: After a personal tragedy, Rosemary and Guy head to Paris, where Guy has landed a teaching job at the Sorbonne; the young couple realize their new apartment has a haunted past.

programme.title: Rosemary's Baby
programme.desc: As Guy finds success, Rosemary's health declines during the course of her pregnancy; Roman and Margaux take a peculiar interest in the couple.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A nurse (Pam Grier) takes revenge on a drug ring for the slaying of her undercover-officer boyfriend.

programme.title: Judgment Night
programme.desc: On their way to a boxing match, four young men take a wrong turn in Chicago and find danger as witnesses to murder.

programme.title: The Last Letter
programme.desc: Catherine Wright struggles with a debilitating sleep disorder. Her husband Michael struggles to cope when their newborn son lay in the wake.

programme.title: 10 Items or Less
programme.desc: Researching a role at a grocery store, an actor (Morgan Freeman) bonds with a feisty cashier (Paz Vega) who is preparing to interview for a new job.

programme.title: Uncle P
programme.desc: A hip-hop superstar (Percy Miller) has his hands full while watching his sister's three children in the suburbs.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: After the senseless murder of her son (Aml Ameen), a grief-stricken mother (Viola Davis) joins forces with another woman (Jennifer Lopez) for vigilante justice.

programme.title: Diary of a Hitman
programme.desc: A weary high-paid killer (Forest Whitaker) balks at his last job when he meets his targets: his client's wife (Sherilyn Fenn) and baby.

programme.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
programme.desc: Framed for a homicide by his fellow officers, a detective (Dean Ambrose) tries to expose the conspiracy to clear his good name.

programme.title: American Dreamer
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck driver who makes extra cash by chauffeuring a low-level drug dealer around town finds himself in a serious financial bind and decides to kidnap the dealer's child.

programme.title: Out-of-Sync
programme.desc: A Los Angeles DJ (LL Cool J) in debt to bookies falls for the girlfriend of a drug dealer he is watching for the police.
A Los Angeles high-school teacher (Samuel L. Jackson) confronts violent students with a grudge against him and society.

programme.title: Beyond the Lights
programme.desc: A troubled star and an aspiring politician fall deeply in love, but those around the couple urge them to put their careers ahead of romance.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina encuentra las cartas de la madre de Camila y le pide a Doris que las queme. Max le platica a Camila sobre esas cartas que le entregó Enrique. Camila culpa a Max por el descuido con las cartas. Marcelina visita a Patricia en su casa.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina le habla a Patricia sobre las cartas que le escribió Rosa Blanco a Camila, en ellas la culpa a ella y a Fausto de la muerte de Leoncio. Patricia le dice a Fausto que los han descubierto. Fausto acude a un misterioso encuentro.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila le muestra a su hermana Esperanza las cartas que escribió Rosa Blanco mientras estuvo en la cárcel. Tras conocer el contenido de las cartas, Camila confronta a quienes traicionaron a su madre. Fausto amenaza a Patricia con decir la verdad.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina, Patricia, Elda e Isabel se reúnen para hablar sobre Rosa Blanco. Camila llena de dudas, no sabe cómo resolver el misterio que hay detrás de la desaparición de su madre. Ezequiel descubre a Gregorio en su casa y estalla furioso contra él.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: La madre Isabel intenta, por todos los medios, justificar sus mentiras de los últimos años. Julia trata de impedir que Ezequiel mate a Gregorio. Luciano y Elda discuten por culpa de Rosa Blanco. Sebastián le confiesa a Amelia que está confundido.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Frente a Irene, el doctor quiere hablar con Tadeo sobre el tiempo que le queda de vida. En su lecho de muerte, todos acuden a ver a Tadeo un poco para despedirse de él.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora e Irene se preparan para leer la carta que Tadeo les dejó, pero se sorprenden por su última voluntad.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Franklin hace todo lo posible en un momento que está a solas con Bella para conquistarla y hacerle olvidar a Orestes. La nueva vida que comienza Chiquinquirá con Orestes tiene la finalidad de olvidar su pasado.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Orestes tiene una duda al escuchar que hablan de lo que pasa entre Chiquinquirá y Ramón, por lo que pide una explicación a su esposa, pero ella lo evade. Yordi es alcanzado por una bala y cae lastimado, Hugo se fuga con él hacia el hospital.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Tras encontrar el cadáver, Salvador pide que lo metan en la furgoneta para que el forense certifique la identidad del muerto. Mientras los policías cumplen la orden, el inspector destaca que Mauricio está en graves problemas.

programme.desc: Al ver a su esposo y a Juana, Carlota exclama que han llegado a su casa nada más y nada menos que Mauricio De la Vega y Juana Pérez.

programme.title: Carita pintada

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Altagracia le reclama a Alirio el escándalo que hizo en la hacienda.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Diego sabe en dónde esconde Rodrigo a Aurora y Françoise. Hablan con Eleazar, y él monta un operativo, pero Martín y Diego quieren incluirse. A pesar de que su jefe le dijo que desertara del operativo, él desobedece y está empecinado en rescatarlas.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Candela despide a Jean-François y después habla con Eleazar para decirle que ya solo está para él. Las circunstancias se acomodan para que Aurora y Diego estén juntos en este final de historia.

programme.desc: Paulina, conmovida por su dolor, acompaña a Simón, pero él le pide detalles de Altagracia.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.sub-title: Pantry Pasta and Rice Pudding Pops
programme.desc: Jamie raids his pantry for a speedy veggie carbonara and rice pudding popsicles.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Hearty Chicken Pot Pie and French Toast Crumpets with Bacon
programme.desc: From a cosy chicken hotpot with braised cabbage to cheesy French-toast crumpets with smashed peas and bacon, a quick, aromatic fish curry, and a golden pear & almond cake with orange drizzle, Jamie proves simple ingredients really can shine.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Caprese Chicken Burgers and Pork and Fennel Ragu
programme.desc: From crispy, herby Caprese chicken burgers to golden spinach pies, creamy pork & fennel ragù with fresh pappardelle, and a comforting tinned peach cobbler with fruit-rippled cream, Jamie proves budget-friendly cooking can be utterly delicious.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Homemade Bagels with Egg Salad and Cherry Chocolate Mousse
programme.desc: Jamie's Thai red chicken & squash traybake uses clever tips to get more for your money, a sardine puttanesca proves budget doesn't mean basic, a bagel recipe creates a low-cost lunch and his cherry chocolate mousse is a little bit of low-cost luxury.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Creamy Broccoli & Blue Cheese Gnocchi and Beef & Potato Pasties
programme.desc: With inspiration to make everyday ingredients into feasts for less, Jamie shares his version of beef & potato pasties, a homemade gnocchi using leftover cheese, fish cakes made from the store cupboard and a retro dessert brought bang up to date.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Silky Eggplant Noodles and Nostalgic Custard Tart
programme.desc: Jamie makes an epic toad in the hole with onion gravy, silky aubergine noodles with peanuts and mint, a comforting and thrifty chicken, sausage & white bean bake with cabbage cake, and a nostalgic jam treacle tart with old-school custard.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Taco night, Dale-style! Puffy al pastor tacos stuffed with pineapple-chile pork, grilled chicken pipian with charred tomato sauce, crispy street corn ribs, and dulce de leche empanadas. Taco Tuesday who?

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: Wok Cooking On A Charcoal Grill
programme.desc: Anything is possible with a wok and a good ol' charcoal grill, at least if you're Chef Dale, who throws together a heavenly spread of fiery eats, from drunken meats, stir-fried veggies, and stir-fried noodles.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: Grilled Loco Moco and Huli Huli Chicken
programme.desc: The options are plentiful when Chef Dale smothers grilled Loco Moco with a mushroom gravy, salty and sweet Huli Huli Chicken with charred pineapple, and healthy scoops of Tuna Water Chestnut poke or mac salad.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: A Festive & Flavorful Christmas in July
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde grills smoked ham and pineapple praline sliders, sweet potatoes with soy maple bacon, eggplant with labneh and cranberries, a holiday mezze plate and a grilled coquito cocktail.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale fires up the tandoor grill, turning out juicy chicken thighs, smoky shrimp with Old Bay yogurt, crispy cauliflower, and a silky mango lassi dessert topped with crunchy candied pistachios. Tandoori done right!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Big Daddy Dale Talde shows you how to marinate, prep, & grill up the biggest and best steaks out there. From a Hanger Steak with Salsa Verde to a Ribeye with Ginger Chili Relish, and tops it all off with the father of all steaks… The Porterhouse.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde creates a tasty menu that kids & parents alike will love! Apple pancakes with coconut brown butter syrup, grilled cheese & tomato soup, cheesy chicken parm, and a sticky s'mores dessert round out the full day of deliciousness.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: Sausage Egg & Cheese All Day Long
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings out the best of brunch with sweet and savory hits such as Bacon Wrapped Dates Stuffed with Chorizo, Maple Sausage, Egg, & Cheese Fried Rice, and the tastiest BBQ Duck, Egg, & Corn Scallion Pancake Sandwiches you've ever eaten.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde gets his beach vibes going with a grilled shrimp & lobster cocktail, clams with lemon breadcrumbs, a killer grilled king crab with burnt citrus butter, and a chilled mango frozen daiquiri. Don't you dare miss this beach party!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's 4th of July and Chef Dale is ready to celebrate by grilling up his takes on summer BBQ classics, like his galbi smash double cheeseburger with kimchi special sauce, honey butter steak fries, and char siu BBQ ribs.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: It's sandwich night! We're making our favorite handheld late-night delights: Chicken Parm Hero, (Not a Philly) Cheesesteak, and Bodega Chopped Cheese. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is a trio of backyard burgers! We're making Oklahoma Smashed Onion Burgers, New York Steakhouse Burgers and Fries, and Bougie Castle-Inspired Sliders.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're making our late-night breakfast for dinner standards with the Waffle House All-Star, Steak and Eggs, and a Fast Food Sausage Breakfast Sandwich.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're grilling our three favorite styles of pizza tonight: Chicago Tavern with Sausage and Hot Giardiniera, New York Ricotta and Hot Honey, and a spicy Detroit Pepperoni.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat and his pal Jason Stanhope meet up outside of Charleston for a day of quail hunting and grilling birds over live coals.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: South Carolina Peach-Glazed Ribs with Rice Middlins
programme.desc: When Pat's friends and fellow barbecue chefs, Bryan Furman and Dr. Howard Conyers, come to town, the guys dig deep into the tricks and traditions of one of Bryan's specialties: pork ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Gainesboro, Tennessee to visit a free-range hog farm, learn about their operations, and grill up a less desired, but no less delicious, cut of hog - pork steaks.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin heads to the Cherokee National Forest for a day of fly-fishing with an old friend, and to cook up their fresh catch over the campfire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Roscoe Family Legacy: Alabama Pit Ribs
programme.desc: Pat heads to Birmingham to team up with artist and chef Roscoe Hall, cooking ribs inspired by Roscoe's family legacy.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Red Curry Braised Pork with Mustard Greens
programme.desc: Pat Martin is in the frozen tundra of Minnesota to visit his new friend, Chef Yia Vang. They brave the cold and break nearly-frozen ground to barbecue a pig's head in the earth.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah celebrate the 4th of July with a supersized barbecue menu including whole hog BBQ, lobster mac'n cheese, Texas-style char dogs, tri-tip and pinto beans.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Beef Shank is the New Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking a humungous Thor's Hammer; cooking up some Catfish & Eggs for breakfast; making a Grilled Salsa Verde; and putting on a pot of Mezcal Charro Beans.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Minnesota's forests for wild mushrooms. He creates a simple grilled mushroom salad, then hand-shapes cavatelli pasta tossed with golden chanterelles, butter, garlic, thyme, and colatura. He shares foraging and cleaning tips.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Nashville Hot Pheasant and Mint Basil Lemonade
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern takes a spin on Nashville-style hot fried chicken. Hot and spicy, batter coated, crispy fried pheasant is paired with a spinach salad topped with bacon vinaigrette and ice-cold mint basil lemonade.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Squid Salad and Crispy Squid on the Plancha
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern creates a vibrant salad where grilled squid is served with shaved fennel, cherry tomatoes, endive, and a lemon dressing. Then, Andrew shares his country-style squid on the plancha with fresh breadcrumbs, chilies, and a homemade aioli.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole tuna and serves it three ways: grilled, raw, and poached.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies working with live sea urchin and scallops by creating a showstopping seafood risotto.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Poultry Perfection: Moroccan Spiced Guinea Hen with Charred Vegetables
programme.desc: Andrew unlocks the rich flavor of guinea hen with a vibrant grilled salad featuring watercress and a mustard-hazelnut vinaigrette. Then, he slow-roasts a whole bird with Middle Eastern spices, served with harissa squash and eggplant-tahini purée.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Southern Shrimp Skewers and Asian Crispy Rice
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern grills beloved shrimp in two distinct ways. He starts with jumbo shrimp and country ham skewers glazed with sweet-hot pepper jelly. Then, he creates Asian-inspired shrimp, served over crispy basmati rice and a complex sambal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Quail Noodle Salad and Antelope Stew
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern creates Vietnamese cold noodle salad and grilled quail. Next, chef makes antelope stew.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew prepares a crave-able appetizer of bison tenderloin bites served with tamarind sauce and a classic Hunan peanut sauce. Then chef grills prosciutto-wrapped whole trout stuffed with lemon and herbs served with rice pilaf.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Bison Tomahawk Chop with Italian-style Eggplant and Panzanella
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares a simple trick for getting the most out of bison tomahawk chops.

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Susie from Hey Grill Hey teaches you how to make a full family dinner right in your own backyard in under 30 minutes! When you serve this grilled honey mustard chicken, creamed corn, and mixed veggies, you'll feel like a Weeknight BBQ Hero!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Susie's bringing in a special guest so you can bring the steakhouse to your backyard! Christie Vanover of Girls Can Grill joins the fun and brings some fingerling potatoes to round out the ribeyes, asparagus, and a one-of-a-kind compound butter!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: It's always kind of a party in the backyard, but it's really a party when Susie breaks out the smoker for some legendary pulled pork sliders, a homemade coleslaw, and a mac and cheese so creamy even the grownups will rave about it.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie hacks his oven into a rotisserie for crispy chicken and chips and bakes a savory spinach and feta pie. Then, the Godfather of Spanish cuisine, Jose Pizarro, shares some gorgeous Mediterranean flavours using just 5 everyday ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.sub-title: Pantry Pasta and Rice Pudding Pops
programme.desc: Jamie raids his pantry for a speedy veggie carbonara and rice pudding popsicles.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie turns frozen fish and veggies into a time saving supper. Then, Italian chef, Gennaro Contaldo rustles up some delicious homemade gnocchi using just 5 easy ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie's dressing a salad with a crown of cheese! He's also got a speedy twist on Sunday roast chicken and an elegant apple tart all with 5 fabulous ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and aioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and aioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Venture into the Spanish countryside to explore an enchanting villa. A cliffside retreat that is ultra-modern. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff, and finally a woodland retreat in Portugal.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.sub-title: Good For Nature, Good For Yourself
programme.desc: Alan is struck by the zen and minimalist interior of a mini château in the luscious French countryside and experiences an outdoor sauna in the garden of a scenic Swedish getaway.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan escapes to an extraordinary waterside fantasy retreat, a sun-soaked property with endless skylights, and the ultimate floating villa.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan treks up the scenic hills of Liguria to an elegant subterranean villa and explores a sleek Irish barn house combining modern and traditional styles.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan returns to his rugged roots of the Scottish Highlands to visit an extraordinary hidden getaway and tours an eccentric space-efficient family home in Sicily.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan surfs the waters of the Norfolk Broads where a family have created their serene paradise home, and dives into a converted magical playground in the Canadian wilderness.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Bill and Sukie Barber have decided to build a new house in one of their fields using primarily locally sourced materials to fit with their sustainable lifestyle: an ambitious remit in such a secluded corner of the Borders.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Scott, Lisa and their 12-year-old son Archie live in a rented house in the suburbs with no space and individuality that they desire from a home. Instead, the family has ordered their new home from a specialist log construction company.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: After years traveling through Europe, Iain and Alyson are ready to put down roots. Their search takes them to Inner Hebridean Island of Skye where they purchase a remote half acre plot, but building a traditional house is a challenge.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Jamie Feilden's 60-acre farm doubles as a charity for urban youth. To fund it, he now plans two prefabricated elliptical cabins on a remote slope. They'll feature timber decks, open-plan living, and green roofs—though weather may delay the build.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Delaval and Veronica are restoring 450 acres for conservation and funding it by building a treehouse in Swanton Novers Wood. A Scottish firm constructs it in 7 sections to minimize damage to the woodland habitat on delivery.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: With three kids and another one on the way, Dave and Lizzy are desperate to get out of their rental and into the home of their dreams. But they've been house hunting for years already, and their due date is fast approaching.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tom and TJ moved to Nashville to pursue a dream job, but they haven't yet put down roots and are cramped into a friend's studio apartment until they do.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Confined to a tiny home in a hot neighborhood, Katie, Michael, and their three daughters quickly sold their property. But now they're squeezed into a one-bedroom rental until the Property Brothers can find them their forever home.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: With a baby on the way, Emily and Ken are searching for the perfect suburban home close to family. And since their condo sold more quickly than expected, they're crashing in her sister's basement until they find 'the one'.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Sandi and Phil have lived in their park-filled waterfront neighborhood for years. But with the arrival of their baby boy, they've suddenly outgrown their one-room loft-style apartment, and are searching for an allergy-free forever home.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tyler and Lindsay love their waterfront lifestyle, but desperately need a family home where they can put down roots. Drew and Jonathan help them find a property in their exclusive neighborhood with minimal compromise.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: In order to cut down on his monster commute, George and Jenn want to move closer to family and friends. And while that's something they both agree on, they're miles apart when it comes to design.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Andrew and Phil are engaged and homeless. And as they couch-surf their way around the city, these soon-to-be-weds are desperate to find a sprawling downtown home of their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Busy parents Dorothy and John have been crashing in his parents' basement, and with baby number two on the way they're desperate to find a home of their own. It's a race against time, and the Property Brothers step in with a plan.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Super-planner Carson has been crashing at her best friend Leah's place. But it's time she found a Nashville pad of her own. Carson knows exactly what she wants, but finding a picture-perfect property that meets her high standards could prove tricky.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Andrew and Phil are engaged and homeless. And as they couch-surf their way around the city, these soon-to-be-weds are desperate to find a sprawling downtown home of their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Busy parents Dorothy and John have been crashing in his parents' basement, and with baby number two on the way they're desperate to find a home of their own. It's a race against time, and the Property Brothers step in with a plan.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Super-planner Carson has been crashing at her best friend Leah's place. But it's time she found a Nashville pad of her own. Carson knows exactly what she wants, but finding a picture-perfect property that meets her high standards could prove tricky.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: After going way over time and budget renovating the main floor of their century home, Jake and Lorraine have run out of steam and need Nicole and Caffrey to take on the second floor before their fast-approaching wedding!

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffrey design a basement getaway for Sharon, Jason and their growing tweens, creating a space where they'll actually want to hang out. They'll also help real estate pro Haaris get his bungalow listing polished up in a competitive market.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Ashley and Colin can't wait to see how Nicole and Caffrey transform Ashley's grandmother's dated bungalow into their new, modern, family home; and Caffrey gets Nicole on board with giving his good friend Marlene a much-needed refresh of her home.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Lauren's childhood home needs big help to become the grown up family home for her, Kyle and their two boys, while real estate agent Odane needs expert staging to help his clients sell high, and buy their dream home.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffrey transform a townhouse into an absolute dream for Nicole and her two daughters, while helping real estate pro Chris uncover and stage this cluttered suburban listing.

programme.title: Styled
programme.sub-title: Old Plan to Open Floor Plan
programme.desc: Sarah and Mark's house needs to be brought into the 21st century so Nicole and Caffery will create a new, timeless and functional design for their family; real estate pro Karina needs help morphing a virtually staged listing into a real showstopper.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: With renters in the basement, Sarah and Shawn have nowhere to go but up to find some tranquility. Nicole and Caffrey take on their dated bedroom and ensuite to create an elevated oasis.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery bring all the moody design vibes to their first speakeasy lounge for game enthusiasts Krysti and Dana; while real estate agent Natalie's compact condo listing needs staging help to spark it into a luxe and warm downtown home.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan returns to his rugged roots of the Scottish Highlands to visit an extraordinary hidden getaway and tours an eccentric space-efficient family home in Sicily.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan surfs the waters of the Norfolk Broads where a family have created their serene paradise home, and dives into a converted magical playground in the Canadian wilderness.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.sub-title: Good For Nature, Good For Yourself
programme.desc: Alan is struck by the zen and minimalist interior of a mini château in the luscious French countryside and experiences an outdoor sauna in the garden of a scenic Swedish getaway.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan treks up the scenic hills of Liguria to an elegant subterranean villa and explores a sleek Irish barn house combining modern and traditional styles.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Paradise Homes

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained-glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Mom and son duo, Paul and Catharine, are overwhelmed by Paul's multi-level backyard. Paul also finds his current indoor fitness regime frustrating. Brian and Sarah muscle up to the challenge by building a gym in his backyard, alongside a hot tub.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ali and Hana have two very talented young children - and a very noisy and crowded house. To give everyone in this family their own space, Brian and Sarah turn an old garage into a kids' music and arts hangout.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Janet's love for her nine grandkids is endless. But so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come visit. To take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid-zone in the backyard, but also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Carly & Nate's social media star dog, Dean the Basset Hound, has a lot of four-legged friends visiting, leaving the home feeling cramped. Brian and Sarah make a bar/lounge for pet and owner gatherings, along with a stylish outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: France & Marc's home is being outgrown by their sport-obsessed sons and provides no inspiring space for France to work from home. Brian and Sarah convert a rundown garage into a spot where France can work and carved out safe sports areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Matt, Mary and their 2 kids don't use their backyard because the neighboring ravine has taken over. Brian and Sarah face environmental challenges to create a beautiful, entertaining and play space for the whole family to enjoy.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Jenn and Josh don't have enough space in their semi-detached home to enjoy their hobbies. Brian and Sarah build a stylish lounge space and convert the existing garage into a multipurpose space for crafting and playing guitar.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah build a sun deck, outdoor dining area and a Grecian inspired, 3-season garage conversion.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Medical doctors and busy parents, Cynthia and Boon miss their camping adventures. Brian and Sarah perform some backyard surgery, and build them a cozy campground retreat so they can go straight from the ER to getting some R&R right in their own yard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Marlow, Phil, their 3 small kids, and Phil's parents all live in one crowded house. Brian and Sarah transform their yard into a spectacular space for cooking, entertaining and playing.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Since having two kids, Sonia and Peter have resorted to staycations at home, but their backyard is a headache. Brian and Sarah create a luxury vacation destination that includes a pool, spa, outdoor kitchen and a stunning four-season structure.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang-out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ex-city slickers, Lauren and Mark, miss their friends and family from the city. Brian and Sarah create a country retreat with an outdoor pad, indoor dining lounge, and a chicken coop. When Lauren and Mark's friends visit, they'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Andrea and David are foodies, but hosting in their "builder basic" yard is no fun. Brian and Sarah make their farm-to-table dreams come true, with a veggie garden, dining room, BBQ zone, and a play space for their 2 kids.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Andrea and David are foodies, but hosting in their "builder basic" yard is no fun. Brian and Sarah make their farm-to-table dreams come true, with a veggie garden, dining room, BBQ zone, and a play space for their 2 kids.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode we visit two completely different parts of the African continent, both offering guests a unique and contrasting flavour of Africa.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit Italy - the birthplace of western civilization and home to two incredible hotels set against some of this country's most stunning backdrops which embody the very best of their own regional history and culture.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Vietnam - a country known for its tropical landscapes, exotic Asian cuisine, and vibrant culture is enjoying a new surge in popularity as a go-to travel destination. And at the forefront of this booming tourism scene are two incredible hotels!

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit the United Kingdom, a nation recognized for its rich history and classic regal elegance, and two hotels that embody the very best of these values despite very different locations.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit two hotels in Eastern Europe which although separated by miles, share the same values of combining their ancient heritage with modern and ground-breaking architecture to deliver their guests a one-of-a-kind experience.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Secret Family Recipies in Ho Chi Minh
programme.desc: Luke searches to find Ho Chi Minh's old markets before they disappear due to District 1's rapid development. Join Luke as he gathers fresh ingredients from a local market, tries some traditional delicacies, and follows his sweet tooth to Marou.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's next stop is the destination of Dalat. Follow Luke as he visits the Art Deco Dalat Train Station, experiences the French influence of the region with a father and son chef duo, and discovers why Dalat is known as the "Land of Eternal Spring"!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Exploring The 'Wet Market' Of Nha Trang
programme.desc: Luke hops on the train in Ga Thap Cham, and finds himself in Nha Trang—a region of Vietnam with a similar vibe to the French Riviera! Luke hand-catches seafood, looks for some fresh durian fruit, and visits a barramundi farm to harvest sea grapes!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Fiery Chili Sauce in Hoi An
programme.desc: Luke is in the town of Hội An. He visits a family who has been making chili sauce for 5 generations, stops by the Historic Japanese Covered Bridge built in 1719, and meets a 4th generation blacksmith who is creating knives from bombshells.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Nadiya Hussain shows Fred the culinary sights of Yorkshire including Bettys' iconic tea and cakes, a rural Wensleydale cheese farm and shop, and a small restaurant which serves homemade samosas, Nadiya's favourite spicy Indian snack.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke arrives in Saigon for a breakfast of iced coffee with condensed milk and a vermicelli noodle dish. Later, he visits his favorite Pho restaurant, then cooks up some spicy Chili Crab Claws.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.sub-title: Malaysian Flying Noodles and Pork Bone Soup
programme.desc: In Kuala Lumpur, Luke meets the famous Mr Hung with a reputation for flying instant noodles and Mr Sou who cooks a hearty Pork Bone Soup with medicinal herbal properties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: The Pizza City You've Never Heard Of
programme.desc: George Kalivas goes on a mission to set the record straight about where to find the best pies on the planet.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas Desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzavona on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and aioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Perfecting Puff Pastry in Burgundy, France
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite pâtisserie.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Master Pasta Maker of Puglia, Italy
programme.desc: TV and radio host Dermot O'Leary takes Fred Sirieix to Puglia in Italy's deep South to his favourite restaurants showcasing simple but sublime cucina povera or poor man's cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Baking Artisinal Pastries in Mallorca, Spain
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Floating Restaurant of Devon, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restaurateur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating café on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Exploring Castles and Cozy Inns in South Wales, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Top chefs in England take Fred Sirieix to experience amazing restaurants where they genuinely love to eat.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: The Pizza City You've Never Heard Of
programme.desc: George Kalivas goes on a mission to set the record straight about where to find the best pies on the planet.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Perfecting Puff Pastry in Burgundy, France
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite pâtisserie.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Master Pasta Maker of Puglia, Italy
programme.desc: TV and radio host Dermot O'Leary takes Fred Sirieix to Puglia in Italy's deep South to his favourite restaurants showcasing simple but sublime cucina povera or poor man's cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Baking Artisinal Pastries in Mallorca, Spain
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Floating Restaurant of Devon, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restaurateur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating café on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Exploring Castles and Cozy Inns in South Wales, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Top chefs in England take Fred Sirieix to experience amazing restaurants where they genuinely love to eat.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzavona on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: The Pizza City You've Never Heard Of
programme.desc: George Kalivas goes on a mission to set the record straight about where to find the best pies on the planet.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Today we have two different hotel experiences in the bustling country of Japan. Hotels that combine elements of past and present Japan to create a sophisticated and luxurious experience in the heart of the city.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit the United Kingdom, a nation recognized for its rich history and classic regal elegance, and two hotels that embody the very best of these values despite very different locations.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Vietnam - a country known for its tropical landscapes, exotic Asian cuisine, and vibrant culture is enjoying a new surge in popularity as a go-to travel destination. And at the forefront of this booming tourism scene are two incredible hotels!

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.desc: Mike is hunting public land in Alabama and has birds gobbling first thing. Listening and watching how this gobbler responds to calling and interacts with the hens with him, Mike relies on good ol' experience to know how to set up to kill this beard.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike travels to the Forgotten Coast to fish Keaton Beach for the first time with the legendary Captain Greg DeVault.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Showcases Captain Josh and Sheriff Eric Aden for a day of fishing and fun in Destin, Fla.; the two friends hit the water, catching fish both offshore and inshore, and reeling in some impressive catches.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Anglers showcase different fishing techniques, share valuable tips, and uncover hidden hotspots.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Learning the fundamentals of flats fishing and the advanced tactics used by proven tournament anglers.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA heads to Jupiter to fish with Ryan Nitz for giant snook.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Learning the fundamentals of flats fishing and the advanced tactics used by proven tournament anglers.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: C.A. heads to Murrells Inlet, S.C., for some low country lure slinging, shrimp and grits and flounder.

programme.title: The Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captain Jonathan Moss finds himself rooted in history in Apalachicola, Fla., where he's scouting the marsh for hungry backcountry dwellers.

programme.title: The Captain's Log
programme.desc: With only a limited amount of time, Capt. Jonathan Moss visits Pine Island Sound in Punta Gorda, Fla., where he goes on the hunt for monster migratory tarpon.

programme.title: The Captain's Log
programme.desc: Embark on a thrilling adventure with Captain Jonathan Moss -- a passionate angler, guide, and conservationist. Explore stunning fishing spots as he shares his invaluable tips, tricks, and tales from each journey, creating unforgettable memories.

programme.title: The Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is fishing in the Northern Indian River Lagoon with DOA Lures Founder, Capt. Mark Nichols.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.sub-title: Traveling Over 2,000 Miles to Fish Here!
programme.desc: Setting out across the country on a road trip visiting and fishing with local fly shops to highlight small businesses that drive a beloved sport: fly-fishing.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: Setting out across the country on a road trip visiting and fishing with local fly shops to highlight small businesses that drive a beloved sport: fly-fishing.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: David Lindsey's 2024 Iowa season was anything but ordinary. He set his sights on one of the greatest bucks ever to roam The Lindsey Way farm - a deer he called Pretty Boy.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting; he makes dishes with his former "Master Chef" contestant, Alex.

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: A remnant of the last Ice Age, the musk ox is almost mythical in appearance. For the people who share the Barren Ground region of Canada with them, they are an integral part of their culture.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: An original film series vividly depicts the sacred experiences, emotions and rewards that come from pursuing wild game in wild places.

programme.title: Pure Hunting Short Films
programme.desc: Willi and Chris are back in New Mexico, bowhunting elk; Willi shot poorly at a bull and, after discovering the cause, hopes for redemption as their hunting days end.

programme.title: The Bearded Buck
programme.desc: Jerry and Austin are still in Nebraska hunting whitetails and muleys. After Jerry filled the first mule deer tag of the trip, the weather takes a turn for the worst and the deer movement slows down drastically.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: Tagged Out at the Dirty Bird
programme.desc: The story of a true old school deer camp meeting new world management practices to take a raw piece of hunting land and develop it into whitetail Mecca.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - David Blanton has had an amazing spring so far - almost too good to be true. You won't believe what happened on his latest turkey hunt in Georgia.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: Practical information for serious whitetail deer hunters.

programme.title: Mark Peterson's The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark is wrapping up his Argentina hunt and heading to Entre Rios to track down the final two birds on his list: the Rock Pigeon and the Eared Dove. This area is home to over 10 million birds, making it a prime hunting ground with flocks of pigeons.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Each year, the crew gets to spend time in camp with some friends; Zach from Big & J gets some time in a blind while reflecting on what hunting in Texas means to him; Texas provides a wide variety of game.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: Slade takes Bentley on his first duck hunt; Slade gets to take a fun trip to duck hunting paradise with some buddies of his.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: Slade and the old Trained Assassins crew are headed back to Montrose in pursuit of a big elk. The conditions are not favorable, but the crew is sticking it out!

programme.title: LBP Spotlight
programme.desc: TA Mahoney is a classic mom-and-pop store known for going the extra mile and treating everyday people like family; keep an eye on Mike though, you never know what kind of prank is up his sleeve.

programme.desc: Hosted by Heather Catlin, Hot Topics wraps up the week's most talked-about stories from across America.
